title: Assignments to structure elements from multiple locations can lead to assignment being skipped

features.name: packed struct with multiple members
features.description: Code should include a packed struct declaration with multiple members including both bit vector and logic types
features.snippet: struct packed { logic [1:0] one_hot; logic binary; } nets_in_struct;

features.name: assign statement to struct member
features.description: Code should include a continuous assignment to a packed struct member using assign keyword

features.name: always_comb with conditional struct member assignment
features.description: Code should include an always_comb block that assigns a struct member conditionally based on another struct member
features.snippet: always_comb begin nets_in_struct.binary = '0; if (nets_in_struct.one_hot[1]) nets_in_struct.binary = 1'b1; end

features.name: struct member read in conditional expression
features.description: Code should include reading a struct member to control conditional logic in an always_comb block

features.name: struct member driving output port
features.description: Code should include assigning a struct member to an output port in procedural code
